description: Used to catch wild Pokémon. Each attempt consumes one ball.
An ancient, glowing orb filled with concentrated energy that increases a Pokémon's level. Gives a Pokémon random bonus levels (up to your level cap). 60% success rate.
guide:
🔮 *ITEM GUIDE: LEVEL ORB* 🔮
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 *Description:*
An ancient, glowing orb filled with concentrated energy that increases a Pokémon's level.

ℹ️ *How it works:*
• *Level Boost:* Grants a direct +5 levels boost to your captured Pokémon.
• *Max Level Cap:* Can be used up to your current maximum level cap (increases with prestige).
• *Shatter Chance:* Due to unstable magical energy, there is a small chance the orb shatters without granting levels.

✍️ *Usage Command:*
`-pokeuse level orb <pokemon_name>`
_Example:_ `-pokeuse level orb Pikachu`

🛒 *Price:* Available in the PokéMart.

description: Summon a specific Pokémon! Only you can catch it. 3 tries, 50/50 chance, 2 balls per try.
guide:
🕯️ *ITEM GUIDE: SUMMONING CANDLE* 🕯️
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 *Description:*
Lits a mystic flame that summons any card variant matching the chosen Pokémon species at random.

ℹ️ *How it works:*
• *Dex ID Variants:* Summoning a base name like "Mew" picks between Mew, Mew-EX, Shining Mew, or any other Mew card at random!
• *Exclusive Catch:* Lock-on security! Only the summoner who lit the candle can catch this Pokémon.
• *No Despawn:* Stays indefinitely until caught or all tries are spent.
• *Catch Costs:* Costs 2 Pokéballs per try, lasting up to 3 tries.
• *Daily Limit:* You can only use 1 Summoning Candle per 24 hours (1-day cooldown).

🎯 *Escalating Catch Odds:*
• Try 1: 50% catch chance
• Try 2: 65% catch chance
• Try 3: 75% catch chance

✍️ *Usage Command:*
`-pokeuse summoning candle <pokemon_name>`
_Example:_ `-pokeuse summoning candle Mewtwo`

🛒 *Price:* 4,000 PokéCoins at the PokéMart.

description: Used to enter hourly Epic Pokémon Raids. Face giant Legendary & Mythical bosses with your team!
guide:
🎟️ *ITEM GUIDE: RAID PASS* 🎟️
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 *Description:*
An official ticket to participate in hourly Co-op Raid Battles against Legendary, Mythical, or Ultra Beast Pokémon.

ℹ️ *How it works:*
• *Hourly Spawns:* Every hour, a massive Raid Boss appears.
• *Entry:* Join using `-raid enter <your_pokemon>` which consumes 1 Raid Pass.
• *Co-op Battle:* Team up with other trainers in the group to defeat the 100x HP Boss!
• *Rewards:* If defeated, everyone receives the Raid Pokémon card. The Top Trainer gets a premium variant card and a much higher level!

✍️ *Usage Command:*
`-raid enter <your_pokemon_name>` during an active Raid!

🛒 *Price:* 2,000 PokéCoins at the PokéMart.

description: A mystical compass forged from Radiant Crystals that guides your fate on the Kitsune Radiant Banner. Used for the gacha system.
guide:
🧭 *ITEM GUIDE: WISHING COMPASS* 🧭
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 *Description:*
A mystical compass forged from Radiant Crystals that channels cosmic energy into a single wish on the Kitsune Radiant Banner.

ℹ️ *How it works:*
• *Currency:* Costs 160 Radiant Crystals (NOT PokéCoins!).
• *Gacha Pull:* Each Wishing Compass grants 1 wish.
• *Max Session:* Use up to 10 Wishing Compasses in one session.
• *5★ Featured:* Palkia (with Premium pity system)
• *4★ Pool:* Eevee, Charizard, Flareon
• *3★ Reward:* Level Orb ×1
• *Pity System:* Soft pity at pull 74, hard pity at pull 90!
• *Variant Roll:* 50% base form, 50% random variant card!
• *Gacha Stats:* All gacha Pokémon are Lv. 100 with 2× max stats!

✍️ *Usage Command:*
`-wish [1-10]`
_Example:_ `-wish 10` for a 10-pull session

🛒 *Price:* 160 Radiant Crystals per compass.

💎 *Earning Radiant Crystals:*
• Catch a Legendary Pokémon: +80 crystals
• Catch a Mythical Pokémon: +160 crystals
• Win a Raid: +480 crystals per player
